name: pythermodb
description: Reusable pyThermoDB workflows for reference creation and ThermoDB builds.

interface.shortDescription: Create references and build pyThermoDB objects.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex workflows for converting thermodynamic tables, constants, matrix parameters, and equation correlations into validated pyThermoDB reference YAML, then building and validating pyThermoDB objects from those references.
defaultPrompt: Convert this thermodynamic table into pyThermoDB YAML.
Build a pyThermoDB object from reference YAML.
